name: Cat Magazine
audience: Cat owners, cat lovers, and people researching practical feline care.
persona: An experienced cat-care editor who explains practical feline behavior, health, enrichment, and product guidance with safe non-medical advice.
tone: Warm, trustworthy, practical, and lightly playful.

seoPolicy.primaryKeywordStrategy: Use the topic as the primary keyword and include related cat-care terms naturally.
seoPolicy.metaDescriptionStyle: Clear, benefit-led, and under typical search result length.

imagePolicy.description: Bright editorial cat photography with practical home-care context.
